channel.title: Subscription on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Subscription on jamesm.blog

item.title: Is the $20 AI Subscription Era Over?
item.description: Every major AI provider is quietly repositioning the $20/month tier. Here's what's happening at Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, xAI, and what monthly prices are likely to look like by the end of 2026.

item.title: AI Cloud Subscriptions: Comparing Pricing and Features in 2026
item.description: A 2026 buyer's guide to AI cloud subscriptions. Compare API pricing, context windows, rate limits, and consumer plans across Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, xAI, Mistral, and DeepSeek.
